title: Geometric Constraint on Residue Phases: Resolving the N(2190) Anomaly and Diagnosing Exotic States
author_string: S. Ceci, R. Omerović, H. Osmanović, M. Uroić, M. Vukšić et al.
abstract: We derive a parameter-free geometric constraint on residue phases dictated by the pole-threshold angle. Using the N(2190) anomaly as a test case, this constraint reveals a sign ambiguity in prior data; correcting it yields a phase of $-28^\circ\pm10^\circ$, matching our prediction. This consistency validates the method as a model-independent diagnostic for distinguishing compact from molecular states, offering a rigorous tool for exotic spectroscopy.
